name: Pickled Grapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Select bunches of firm, ripe grapes. Wash the grapes thoroughly.
2. Do not remove stems from the grapes.
3. Pack the grapes into sterilized jars, taking care to avoid crushing them.
4. Prepare a syrup by mixing 3 cups of sugar with 2 cups of vinegar in a saucepan.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil and continue boiling for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Carefully pour the hot syrup over the grapes in the jars, ensuring they are fully covered.
7. Seal the jars tightly.
8. Store the pickled grapes in a dark place. They will retain their color when stored properly.
9. These pickled grapes can be used for garnishing purposes.
